new_cascade_issues.title: Mass exceeds accommodation envelope
new_cascade_issues.description: The proposed mass increase from 33.8 kg to 36 kg violates the platform's accommodation envelope of 35 kg, leading to potential structural and thermal issues.

new_cascade_issues.title: Potential impact on mechanical subsystems
new_cascade_issues.description: Increasing the payload mass may affect the structural integrity and vibration characteristics of the mechanical subsystem, potentially requiring reanalysis or additional testing.

new_cascade_issues.title: Thermal management constraints
new_cascade_issues.description: The increased mass may affect thermal dissipation and heat distribution, potentially impacting the thermal subsystem's ability to maintain temperature stability.

new_cascade_issues.title: Power consumption considerations
new_cascade_issues.description: The additional mass may require more power for operation, potentially impacting the power subsystem's ability to meet the required power budget.

new_missing_tests.activity: Shock test per launcher SRS ICD
new_missing_tests.reason: The proposed mass increase may necessitate re-evaluation of shock response and additional testing to ensure compliance with the launcher's structural requirements.

new_missing_tests.activity: Thermal balance test to validate TMM
new_missing_tests.reason: The increased mass may affect thermal management, requiring a re-evaluation of the thermal model and additional testing.
